title: Air travellers security charge technical information - Canada.ca
content:
## Air travellers security charge technical information
The Canada Revenue Agency is responsible for administering the air travellers security charge (ATSC) under the Air Travellers Security Charge Act . The ATSC is paid by air travellers and collected by air carriers or their agents at the time a ticket is purchased.

## Publications and information

### Questions and answers
Information about the application and administration of the ATSC
Announcements about legislation and policies relating to the ATSC
Current rates of ATSC, as set out in the Air Travellers Security Charge Act
Forms on various topics relating to the application of the ATSC

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
